scripts.build:notebook: pnpm --filter @auplc/runtime-status run build && pnpm --filter @auplc/jupyterlab-runtime-status run build
scripts.build:code: pnpm --filter @auplc/runtime-status run build && pnpm --filter auplc-hub-link run build
scripts.build:all: pnpm -r --filter './hub/frontend/apps/**...' --filter './hub/frontend/packages/login-css...' run build && pnpm --filter @auplc/runtime-status run build && pnpm --filter @auplc/jupyterlab-runtime-status run build && pnpm --filter auplc-hub-link run build
